q: The study of the flow of liquid is called ___.
Fluid is a substance that offers no permanent resistance to ___ forces.
The volume of a liquid does not depend on pressure if the ___ is constant.
Fluid statics concentrates on fluids at ___.
Fluid dynamics concerns with the fluid in ___.
Hydrostatic is the study of liquid at ___.
In the flow of fluids, the path or flow of the fluid particles is called ___.
If fluid particles are moving steady in smooth paths in layers, with each layer moving smoothly past the adjacent layers with no mixing, such a flow is called ___ flow.
In steady laminar flow, streamlines do not ___ each other.
If the flow or path of the fluid particles are irregular, their direction is always changing or whirling, this fluid movement is called ___ flow.
Ideal laminar fluid flow considers that the fluid is ___.
Internal friction in fluids is called ___.
An ideal laminar fluid flow has ___ viscosity.
